nasb.text: All who heard them kept them in mind, saying, “What then will this child turn out to be?” For the hand of the Lord was certainly with him.

esv.text: and all who heard them laid them up in their hearts, saying, “What then will this child be?” For the hand of the Lord was with him.

cnv.text: 凡聽見的就把這些事放在心裡，說：“這孩子將會成為怎樣的人呢？因為主的手與他同在。”

ccb.text: 听见的人都在想：“这孩子将来会怎样呢？因为主与他同在。”

csbs.text: 所有听见的人都把这一切存在心里，说：“这孩子将来究竟会怎么样呢？”因为显然有主的手与他同在。
